# installedApps

**Instance Property**

The set of apps installed by the alternative app marketplace.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor final var installedApps: Set<AppLibrary.App> { get set }
```

## Accessing installed apps

- **app(forAppleItemID:)**: Provides the app for the given app identifier.

items.description: Provides the app for the given app identifier.
